phnom_penh.name: Royal Palace
phnom_penh.description: Official residence of the King of Cambodia with traditional Khmer architecture.

phnom_penh.name: Silver Pagoda
phnom_penh.description: Famous pagoda inside the Royal Palace complex with silver floor tiles.

phnom_penh.name: National Museum of Cambodia
phnom_penh.description: Museum displaying Khmer art, sculptures, and historical artifacts.

phnom_penh.name: Wat Phnom
phnom_penh.description: Historic Buddhist temple and iconic landmark of Phnom Penh.

phnom_penh.name: Sisowath Quay Riverside
phnom_penh.description: Popular riverside area with restaurants, cafes, bars, and sunset views.

phnom_penh.name: Central Market
phnom_penh.description: Art deco market famous for souvenirs, jewelry, clothes, and local products.

phnom_penh.name: Russian Market
phnom_penh.description: Popular market for handicrafts, local street food, and fashion items.

phnom_penh.name: Tuol Sleng Genocide Museum
phnom_penh.description: Museum preserving Cambodia’s history during the Khmer Rouge regime.

phnom_penh.name: Choeung Ek Genocidal Center
phnom_penh.description: Historical memorial site known as the Killing Fields.

phnom_penh.name: AEON Mall Phnom Penh
phnom_penh.description: Large shopping mall with international brands, cinema, and restaurants.

phnom_penh.name: Bassac Lane
phnom_penh.description: Popular nightlife street with bars, live music, and cocktail lounges.

phnom_penh.name: Mekong River Cruise
phnom_penh.description: Sunset and dinner cruises along the Mekong and Tonle Sap rivers.

siem_reap.name: Angkor Wat
siem_reap.description: World-famous ancient temple complex and symbol of Cambodia.

siem_reap.name: Angkor Thom
siem_reap.description: Ancient Khmer capital city with temples and historical gates.

siem_reap.name: Bayon Temple
siem_reap.description: Temple famous for giant smiling stone faces.

siem_reap.name: Ta Prohm
siem_reap.description: Temple surrounded by giant tree roots and jungle scenery.

siem_reap.name: Banteay Srei
siem_reap.description: Pink sandstone temple known for detailed carvings.

siem_reap.name: Pub Street
siem_reap.description: Popular nightlife area with bars, clubs, restaurants, and live music.

siem_reap.name: Angkor Night Market
siem_reap.description: Night market selling souvenirs, handicrafts, clothes, and street food.

siem_reap.name: Tonle Sap Floating Village
siem_reap.description: Floating houses and fishing communities on Tonle Sap Lake.

siem_reap.name: Phare Cambodian Circus
siem_reap.description: Cultural circus combining theater, acrobatics, and Cambodian storytelling.

siem_reap.name: Cambodian Cultural Village
siem_reap.description: Theme park showcasing Cambodian traditions and cultural performances.

siem_reap.name: Siem Reap Riverside
siem_reap.description: Relaxing riverside area with cafes, restaurants, and local shops.

siem_reap.name: Artisans Angkor
siem_reap.description: Workshop and store promoting traditional Khmer handicrafts.
